title: UserAnswers
description: End user's in-app questionnaire responses, submitted by the SDK when requesting a PersonalizedPalette. Each response is a {question_id, answer_value} pair — see server/src/data/questions.json for the canonical question set (5 core + 10 deep-dive). Whether all 5 core questions were answered is enforced at runtime in questionsService.ts, not by this schema — ajv can't cleanly express 'these specific array elements must be present' against a dynamic question set.
